channel.title: commonsense learning on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in commonsense learning on Sukai Huang

item.title: Ernest_davis Benchmarks for Automated Commonsense Reasoning a Survey 2023
item.description: [TOC] Title: Benchmarks for Automated Commonsense Reasoning a Survey Author: Ernest Davis Publish Year: 9 Feb 2023 Review Date: Thu, Mar 2, 2023 url: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2302.04752.pdf Summary of paper we mainly focus on the section where the author discusses about features of commonsense reasoning generally. Terms clarify what we mean by common sense what is exactly “commonsensical”? Claims about common sense that seem true to the author Commonsense knowledge is common.
